_comment: Paths default to XDG per-user dirs: data_dir=~/.local/share/photo-keywords, state_dir=~/.local/state/photo-keywords, taxonomy_path and secrets_file under ~/.config/photo-keywords. Set any of data_dir/state_dir/taxonomy_path/secrets_file to an absolute path to override. This file is loaded from ~/.config/photo-keywords/config.json ($PHOTO_KEYWORDS_CONFIG or --config override it).
